name: lorewire-video
description: Remotion project for LoreWire doodle shorts. Also hosts the Cloud Run render service (Phase 1 of _plans/2026-06-14-cloud-run-render.md).

scripts.test:server: tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && node --test server/index.test.mjs server/ffmpeg.test.mjs server/r2.test.mjs
scripts.//deploy comment: Reuses the GCS service account as the Cloud Run runtime identity via --service-account; GCS credentials resolve through ADC (metadata server) — no PEM env vars on the running container. Runtime env vars are CRON_SECRET + GCS_BUCKET at minimum; ALSO required when R2 is the active media writer (R2_MEDIA_WRITE_ENABLED=true): R2_ACCOUNT_ID (or R2_ENDPOINT), R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID, R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, R2_MEDIA_BUCKET, MEDIA_PUBLIC_BASE. See README-cloud-run-setup.md for the flip checklist. 8 vCPU/16 GB sized for 1920x1080 renders to stay under Vercel's 800 s cron timeout (2 vCPU runs ~3-5 fps and busts the timeout on a 3700-frame envelope).
scripts.deploy:cloud-run: gcloud run deploy lorewire-render --source . --region ${CLOUD_RUN_REGION:-us-central1} --memory 16Gi --cpu 8 --timeout 3600 --no-allow-unauthenticated --service-account $GCS_CLIENT_EMAIL --update-env-vars CRON_SECRET=$CRON_SECRET --update-env-vars GCS_BUCKET=$GCS_BUCKET
